show_percent.label: Show percentage
show_percent.description: Show the phone battery percentage next to the glyph

notify_low.label: Low battery notification
notify_low.description: Notify when the phone battery drops below the threshold

low_threshold.label: Low battery threshold (%)
low_threshold.description: Phone battery percentage that triggers the low notification

hide_when_absent.label: Hide when phone absent
hide_when_absent.description: Hide the widget when no paired phone is reachable

storage_subpath.label: Storage subpath
storage_subpath.description: Path under the SFTP mount to open (Android primary storage is storage/emulated/0)
